creator: petef@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

OK, a fix has been committed for kdeaddons, kdeadmin, kdeartwork, 
kdebase2, kdegames2, kdelibs2, kdemultimedia2, kdetoys2, kdeutils2, 
and kio_fish.  The other ports that are affected by this still await 
some testing -- this should be done by this weekend.
